responseMessageContents.text:
The user wants to sync credentials. Let me understand the context - they've been working on IVX app, credential audit showed GITHUB_TOKEN present and valid. They cloned the repo. Now they want to sync all credentials.

Let me check what credentials exist and where they need to be synced.

input.command: ls /home/user/rork-global-real-estate-invest 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "---"; cd /home/user/rork-global-real-estate-invest && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null
